creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text: Thank you.  Turns out it's a bug, fixed in 11-CURRENT as r272409.  Unfortunately the fix won't be a part of 10.1-RELEASE.  The bug only affects iSCSI targets that claim compliance with an ancient SCSI version (SPC-2) and do not have LUN 0 configured.  Easiest way to work around it would be to set up LUN 0 instead of 2.
